title: A Way to preview the App Demo functionality in test apps
excerpt:
Currently the App Demo Experience is only available to apps listed in the marketplace. 
Please could there be a way to try it out for private test apps too? This is to ensure the experience works as expected in advance o…

posts.author: danlester (Dan Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the App Demo Experience is only available to apps listed in the marketplace.

Please could there be a way to try it out for private test apps too? This is to ensure the experience works as expected in advance of publishing.

This would be especially important if you are also able to provide context indicating if the app is actually running in a demo sandbox, as requested in a separate issue here.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your request @danlester !
